signals.npcLine: Crypto streets run cold; trust is thinning fast.
signals.questPulse: Market pulse dropping, danger lurking in every trade.
signals.worldFeed: Digital wealth ebbs, shadows grow on the neon skyline.
signals.clueEvent: Sudden market shifts spark whispers of sabotage.

signals.npcLine: SPK spikes just got noticed by net runners.
signals.questPulse: Unstable tokens flicker; perfect for extraction ops.
signals.worldFeed: Rising buzz around banned digital coins; heat intensifies.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted chatter hints at hidden asset movements.

signals.npcLine: RAVE's strange activity triggers security bots nearby.
signals.questPulse: New data points glowing in the neural net's dark.
signals.worldFeed: Cryptic patterns emerge on AstroNet, possible hack alerts.
signals.clueEvent: Unusual transaction trails traced to abandoned nodes.

signals.npcLine: Pengu token's rise means a jackpot run—risk high.
signals.questPulse: Venture into unstable markets before the fear spikes.
signals.worldFeed: Digital market volatility promises lucrative bounties.
signals.clueEvent: Shadow syndicates recruit fresh runners for token raids.
